info.name: Boy Kisser
info.description: "You like kissing boys, don't you.", Boy Kisser
info.author: Wizards of the Coast

description.p: The Boy Kisser has white fur with dog/cat like features. They are humanoid but have animal like traits. They are very fluffy. They also are diverse in small details such as eye color, size, weight, and height.
A species we know little about as they are not known for keeping records. All we know is that they are a newer species who have a unique animalistic traits.

ul.li: Size: Medium (about 4–7 feet tall) or Small (about 2–4 feet tall), chosen when you select this species
Speed: Your base walking speed is 30 feet. You can run on all fours at a speed of 50ft.

description.p: As a Boy Kisser, you have these special traits.

Boy Kissing Pheromone. You have a pheromone that causes the male species that effects their sexuality. When a boy is around you then they are more comfortable with the idea of kissing you. The longer your around the more comfortable they get to be with you. You eventually get advantage on Persuasion rolls with that boy (DM chooses when it is used).
Thick Fur. Your fur is so thick that people feel comfortable hugging you. You also resistant to cold damage.
Part animal. You can get on all fours and run at a increased speed(+10). You can speak, read, and write Common and one other language of your choice.

You have a pheromone that causes the male species that effects their sexuality. When a boy is around you then they are more comfortable with the idea of kissing you. The longer your around the more comfortable they get to be with you. You eventually get advantage on Persuasion rolls with that boy (DM chooses when it is used).

sheet.description: You have a pheromone that causes the male species that effects their sexuality. When a boy is around you then they are more comfortable with the idea of kissing you. The longer your around the more comfortable they get to be with you. You eventually get advantage on Persuasion rolls with that boy (DM chooses when it is used).

description.p: Your fur is so thick that people feel comfortable hugging you. You also resistant to cold damage.

sheet.description: Your fur is so thick that people feel comfortable hugging you. You also resistant to cold damage.

description.p: You can get on all fours and run at an increased speed (+10).

sheet.description: You can get on all fours and run at an increased speed (+10).
